description.en: Direct income support providing ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each every four months
description.hi: सभी भूमिधारक किसान परिवारों को हर चार महीने में ₹2,000 की तीन समान किस्तों में प्रति वर्ष ₹6,000 की प्रत्यक्ष आय सहायता
description.ta: அனைத்து நில உடைமை விவசாயி குடும்பங்களுக்கும் ஒவ்வொரு நான்கு மாதங்களுக்கும் ₹2,000 மூன்று சம தவணைகளில் ஆண்டுக்கு ₹6,000 நேரடி வருமான ஆதரவு
description.te: అన్ని భూస్వామ్య రైతు కుటుంబాలకు ప్రతి నాలుగు నెలలకు ₹2,000 మూడు సమాన వాయిదాలలో సంవత్సరానికి ₹6,000 ప్రత్యక్ష ఆదాయ మద్దతు

schemes.launchingAuthority: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Land-holding is the only eligibility criteria. Institutional landholders, income tax payers, and government employees are excluded.

schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into Aadhaar-seeded bank accounts. 20th installment expected June-July 2025, benefiting approximately 9.8 crore farmers.
schemes.applicationProcess: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in or through Common Service Centers with land records and Aadhaar-linked bank account
schemes.contactInfo: PM-KISAN Helpline: 155261 / 011-24300606, Email: pmkisan-ict@gov.in, Website: pmkisan.gov.in

name.en: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
name.hi: आयुष्मान भारत - प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
name.ta: ஆயுஷ்மான் பாரத் - பிரதம மந்திரி ஜன் ஆரோக்ய யோஜனா
name.te: ఆయుష్మాన్ భారత్ - ప్రధాన మంత్రి జన్ ఆరోగ్య యోజన

description.en: World's largest health insurance scheme providing ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Recently extended to all senior citizens aged 70 years and above.
description.hi: द्वितीयक और तृतीयक देखभाल अस्पताल में भर्ती के लिए प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख प्रदान करने वाली विश्व की सबसे बड़ी स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना। हाल ही में 70 वर्ष और उससे अधिक आयु के सभी वरिष्ठ नागरिकों तक विस्तारित।
description.ta: இரண்டாம் நிலை மற்றும் மூன்றாம் நிலை பராமரிப்பு மருத்துவமனையில் சேர்க்கைக்கு ஒரு குடும்பத்திற்கு ஆண்டுக்கு ₹5 லட்சம் வழங்கும் உலகின் மிகப்பெரிய சுகாதார காப்பீட்டு திட்டம்
description.te: ద్వితీయ మరియు తృతీయ సంరక్షణ ఆసుపత్రిలో చేరడానికి కుటుంబానికి సంవత్సరానికి ₹5 లక్షలు అందించే ప్రపంచంలోనే అతిపెద్ద ఆరోగ్య బీమా పథకం

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Families identified through SECC 2011 database. All senior citizens aged 70+ are now eligible regardless of income.

schemes.benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization, cashless and paperless treatment at empanelled hospitals, covers 1,949 procedures
schemes.applicationProcess: Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in, get Ayushman Card from nearest Ayushman Mitra, hospital, or apply online through NHA website/Ayushman app
schemes.contactInfo: Ayushman Bharat Helpline: 14555, Email: support@pmjay.gov.in, Website: pmjay.gov.in

description.en: Housing for All scheme providing financial assistance for construction or purchase of houses in urban areas. Phase 2 aims to construct 1 crore houses by 2029. Deadline extended till December 2025.
description.hi: शहरी क्षेत्रों में घरों के निर्माण या खरीद के लिए वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करने वाली सभी के लिए आवास योजना। चरण 2 का लक्ष्य 2029 तक 1 करोड़ घर बनाना है। समय सीमा दिसंबर 2025 तक बढ़ाई गई।
description.ta: நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகளில் வீடுகள் கட்டுவதற்கு அல்லது வாங்குவதற்கு நிதி உதவி வழங்கும் அனைவருக்கும் வீட்டுவசதி திட்டம்
description.te: పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలలో ఇళ్ల నిర్మాణం లేదా కొనుగోలుకు ఆర్థిక సహాయం అందించే అందరికీ గృహ పథకం

launchingAuthority: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Family should not own a pucca house in any part of India. Annual household income: EWS (up to ₹3 lakh), LIG (₹3-6 lakh), MIG-I (₹6-12 lakh), MIG-II (₹12-18 lakh)

benefits: Interest subsidy on home loans up to ₹2.67 lakh, direct financial assistance for house construction. EWS: ₹1.5 lakh subsidy, LIG: ₹2.67 lakh subsidy
applicationProcess: Apply online at pmaymis.gov.in through Common Service Centers or directly. Aadhaar verification mandatory.
contactInfo: PMAY-U Helpline: 1800-11-6163, Email: pmay-urban@gov.in, Website: pmaymis.gov.in

description.en: Housing scheme for rural poor providing pucca houses with essential amenities. Phase 2 aims to construct 2 crore houses by 2029.
description.hi: आवश्यक सुविधाओं के साथ पक्के मकान प्रदान करने वाली ग्रामीण गरीबों के लिए आवास योजना। चरण 2 का लक्ष्य 2029 तक 2 करोड़ घर बनाना है।
description.ta: அத்தியாவசிய வசதிகளுடன் பக்கா வீடுகளை வழங்கும் கிராமப்புற ஏழைகளுக்கான வீட்டுவசதி திட்டம்
description.te: అవసరమైన సౌకర్యాలతో పక్కా ఇళ్లను అందించే గ్రామీణ పేదల కోసం గృహ పథకం

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Rural households without pucca house or living in kutcha/dilapidated dwelling

benefits: ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas, ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas. Includes toilet assistance of ₹12,000, 90/95 days of unskilled wage employment under MGNREGA
applicationProcess: Through Gram Panchayat or online via PMAY-G portal (pmayg.nic.in)
contactInfo: PMAY-G Helpline: 1800-11-6446, Email: pmayg@gov.in, Website: pmayg.nic.in

name.en: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
name.hi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी अधिनियम
name.ta: மகாத்மா காந்தி தேசிய கிராமப்புற வேலைவாய்ப்பு உத்தரவாத சட்டம்
name.te: మహాత్మా గాంధీ జాతీయ గ్రామీణ ఉపాధి హామీ చట్టం

description.en: Legal guarantee of 100 days of wage employment per rural household each year for unskilled manual work. Wage rates increased by 2.33% to 7.48% for FY 2025-26.
description.hi: अकुशल शारीरिक कार्य के लिए प्रति ग्रामीण परिवार प्रति वर्ष 100 दिनों के वेतन रोजगार की कानूनी गारंटी। वित्त वर्ष 2025-26 के लिए मजदूरी दरों में 2.33% से 7.48% की वृद्धि।
description.ta: திறமையற்ற கைமுறை வேலைக்கு ஒவ்வொரு கிராமப்புற குடும்பத்திற்கும் ஆண்டுக்கு 100 நாட்கள் ஊதிய வேலைவாய்ப்பின் சட்ட உத்தரவாதம்
description.te: నైపుణ్యం లేని మాన్యువల్ పనికి ప్రతి గ్రామీణ కుటుంబానికి సంవత్సరానికి 100 రోజుల వేతన ఉపాధి యొక్క చట్టపరమైన హామీ

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Any Indian citizen above 18 years residing in rural area willing to do unskilled manual work

benefits: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per household per year. Wages range from ₹221 to ₹357 per day (state-wise, FY 2025-26). Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days.
applicationProcess: Apply at Gram Panchayat with photo and proof of residence to get Job Card

description.en: Small deposit scheme for girl child under Beti Bachao Beti Padhao campaign with attractive 8.2% interest rate (Q2 FY 2025-26) and complete tax exemption.
description.hi: बेटी बचाओ बेटी पढ़ाओ अभियान के तहत बालिकाओं के लिए आकर्षक 8.2% ब्याज दर (Q2 वित्त वर्ष 2025-26) और पूर्ण कर छूट के साथ छोटी जमा योजना।
description.ta: பெட்டி பச்சாவ் பெட்டி படாவ் பிரச்சாரத்தின் கீழ் பெண் குழந்தைகளுக்கான சிறிய வைப்பு திட்டம் கவர்ச்சிகரமான 8.2% வட்டி விகிதம்
description.te: బేటీ బచావో బేటీ పఢావో ప్రచారంలో భాగంగా బాలికల కోసం ఆకర్షణీయమైన 8.2% వడ్డీ రేటుతో చిన్న డిపాజిట్ పథకం

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Account can be opened for girl child below 10 years of age. Maximum 2 accounts per family.

benefits: 8.2% interest rate per annum (compounded yearly, Q2 FY 2025-26). Tax deduction under Section 80C up to ₹1.5 lakh. Maturity after 21 years or marriage after 18 years. Minimum deposit ₹250, maximum ₹1.5 lakh per year.
applicationProcess: Open account at any post office or authorized bank (SBI, PNB, BOI, etc.) with birth certificate and parent's documents

description.en: Collateral-free micro-credit scheme providing loans up to ₹20 lakh (previously ₹10 lakh) to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises for income-generating activities.
description.hi: आय-सृजन गतिविधियों के लिए गैर-कॉर्पोरेट, गैर-कृषि लघु/सूक्ष्म उद्यमों को ₹20 लाख तक (पहले ₹10 लाख) का ऋण प्रदान करने वाली संपार्श्विक-मुक्त सूक्ष्म-ऋण योजना।
description.ta: வருமானம் ஈட்டும் செயல்பாடுகளுக்கு பெருநிறுவனம் அல்லாத, விவசாயம் அல்லாத சிறு/நுண்ணிய நிறுவனங்களுக்கு ₹20 லட்சம் வரை கடன் வழங்கும் பிணையம் இல்லாத நுண்கடன் திட்டம்
description.te: ఆదాయ-ఉత్పత్తి కార్యకలాపాల కోసం కార్పొరేట్ కాని, వ్యవసాయేతర చిన్న/సూక్ష్మ సంస్థలకు ₹20 లక్షల వరకు రుణాలు అందించే తాకట్టు-రహిత సూక్ష్మ-రుణ పథకం

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: For non-corporate, non-farm income generating activities in manufacturing, trading, services, and allied agricultural activities (poultry, dairy, beekeeping)

benefits: Collateral-free loans in 3 categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5 lakh to ₹20 lakh). Credit guarantee coverage through CGTMSE/CGFMU.
applicationProcess: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI with business plan and required documents. No processing fee.
contactInfo: MUDRA Helpline: 1800-180-1111, Email: mudra@sidbi.in, Website: udyamimitra.in

description.en: Government-guaranteed pension scheme for unorganized sector workers providing guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years. Over 7.60 crore enrollments as of March 2025.
description.hi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के श्रमिकों के लिए सरकार-गारंटीड पेंशन योजना जो 60 वर्ष के बाद ₹1,000 से ₹5,000 की गारंटीड मासिक पेंशन प्रदान करती है। मार्च 2025 तक 7.60 करोड़ से अधिक नामांकन।
description.ta: 60 வயதுக்குப் பிறகு ₹1,000 முதல் ₹5,000 வரை உத்தரவாத மாதாந்திர ஓய்வூதியம் வழங்கும் அமைப்புசாரா துறை தொழிலாளர்களுக்கான அரசாங்க உத்தரவாத ஓய்வூதிய திட்டம்
description.te: 60 సంవత్సరాల తర్వాత ₹1,000 నుండి ₹5,000 వరకు హామీ ఇవ్వబడిన నెలవారీ పెన్షన్ అందించే అసంఘటిత రంగ కార్మికుల కోసం ప్రభుత్వ-హామీ పెన్షన్ పథకం

launchingAuthority: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA)

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Indian citizen aged 18-40 years with savings bank account. Should not be income tax payer (since October 1, 2022).

benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000, ₹2,000, ₹3,000, ₹4,000, or ₹5,000 after 60 years based on contribution. Contributions start as low as ₹42 per month for 18-year-old. Spouse continuation and nominee benefits available.
applicationProcess: Apply at any bank branch or post office with savings account and Aadhaar. Auto-debit facility from savings account.
contactInfo: APY Helpline: 1800-110-001, Email: apy@npscra.nsdl.co.in, Website: npscra.nsdl.co.in

description.en: Credit-linked subsidy scheme operating since 2008 for setting up new micro-enterprises in manufacturing, trading, and service sectors. Provides 15% to 35% subsidy.
description.hi: विनिर्माण, व्यापार और सेवा क्षेत्रों में नए सूक्ष्म उद्यम स्थापित करने के लिए 2008 से संचालित क्रेडिट-लिंक्ड सब्सिडी योजना। 15% से 35% सब्सिडी प्रदान करती है।
description.ta: உற்பத்தி, வர்த்தகம் மற்றும் சேவை துறைகளில் புதிய நுண்ணிய நிறுவனங்களை அமைப்பதற்கான கடன்-இணைக்கப்பட்ட மானிய திட்டம்
description.te: తయారీ, వాణిజ్యం మరియు సేవా రంగాలలో కొత్త సూక్ష్మ సంస్థలను ఏర్పాటు చేయడానికి క్రెడిట్-లింక్డ్ సబ్సిడీ పథకం

launchingAuthority: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

eligibilityCriteria.additionalCriteria: Minimum 8th pass for manufacturing projects above ₹10 lakh. No income limit. Should not have availed benefits under any other scheme.

benefits: 15-35% subsidy on project cost: General category (15% urban, 25% rural), Special category SC/ST/OBC/Minorities/Women/Physically Handicapped/Ex-servicemen/Hill & Border areas (25% urban, 35% rural). Maximum project cost: ₹50 lakh (manufacturing), ₹20 lakh (service/trading).
applicationProcess: Apply online at kviconline.gov.in/pmegpeportal with project report. Training provided through KVIC/KVIB.
contactInfo: PMEGP Helpline: 1800-3000-0034, Email: pmegp@kvic.org.in, Website: kviconline.gov.in

metadata.source: Official Government Portals, myScheme.gov.in, News sources (2025 data)
metadata.dataQuality: Real 2025 data with current interest rates, wage rates, and eligibility criteria
metadata.coverage: All India schemes with state-specific variations where applicable
